pi_items.metadata_value: Dark mode: tab bar icons inverted
pi_items.verified_value: Dark mode: tab bar icons inverted
pi_items.source: Confirmed via scripts/seed_redmine.rb which seeds the issue 'Dark mode: tab bar icons inverted on Android 12 (Material You)'.
Confirmed via scripts/seed_redmine.rb which seeds the issue 'Offline mode: local changes lost on sync conflict'.
Confirmed via scripts/seed_redmine.rb which seeds the issue 'Push notifications not delivered when app is force-closed on iOS'.
Confirmed via scripts/seed_redmine.rb which seeds the project with identifier 'mobile-app-v2'.
Matches task instructions and verifier.py which checks that the 'Dark mode' issue status is changed to 'Closed'.
Matches task instructions and verifier.py which checks that the 'Offline sync' issue is moved to the 'v2.1 Hotfix' milestone.
Matches task instructions and verifier.py which checks that the 'Push notif' issue status is changed to 'Resolved'.
Matches task instructions and verifier.py which checks that a >=1.5 hour time entry is logged.
Matches export_result.sh which outputs the result to this file path, and verifier.py which reads from it.

privileged_info_summary: The environment relies on synthetic data populated by a ruby script (seed_redmine.rb). A project 'mobile-app-v2' is created containing specific issues. The Scrum Master task requires modifying these issues: closing the 'Dark mode: tab bar icons inverted' issue, moving 'Offline mode: local changes lost' to the 'v2.1 Hotfix' milestone, resolving the 'Push notifications not delivered' issue while logging 1.5 hours of testing, and generating a closeout summary issue. These requirements align exactly with both the task prompt and the verifier script logic.
